lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. It is in perfect working order and shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are functioning as new.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on both the interior and exterior. The car is currently operational but will require some maintenance and minor repairs in the near future.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts reliably, with no current mechanical issues to report. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, showing only minimal wear on the upholstery. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. This car represents a solid, dependable option for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for daily driving.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine runs roughly and there is a significant transmission slip when shifting. Externally, the car shows its age with several large dents, visible rust on the rocker panels, and heavily faded paint. The interior has seen better days, with significant tears in the seating and a non-functional climate control system. This is a project car best suited for a mechanic or someone looking for a parts vehicle.
Unlock the potential in this budget-friendly project car! It’s the perfect choice for a talented mechanic or a DIY enthusiast looking for a vehicle with

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability. Demonstrating a high standard of mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an authoritative presence on the road. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's in really solid shape! It runs like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. Perfect for daily commuting or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been recently overhauled for optimal cam timing. The chassis remains composed thanks to proactive rear subframe reinforcement and a Bilstein B16 coilover setup, enhancing the factory MacPherson strut/multi-link geometry. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock. While the exterior shows minor road wear, the mechanical vitals are strong, with consistent compression across all cylinders and a crisp, responsive throttle map.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep luster, though a few minor stone chips on the front bumper reflect its honest history on the road. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with supple leather upholstery showing only light wear on the driver’s bolster. All tech features, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. Mechanically, it has been fastidiously cared for with a documented service history; the engine runs smooth and the transmission shifts seamlessly. We recently fitted a fresh set of all-season tires and performed a full fluid flush to ensure it's ready for its next owner. This car offers a reliable, comfortable, and stylish driving experience for someone who appreciates a vehicle that has

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers reliable performance and sophisticated styling. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort. An exceptional value proposition for those seeking a balance of luxury and dependability.

Presented for your consideration is this exceptionally well-maintained example of automotive engineering. This vehicle offers a distinguished presence on the road, characterized by its mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety, this model represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to hit the road with you. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a broad power band. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis benefits from reinforced subframe mounting points and a well-sorted suspension geometry, ensuring neutral handling and high-speed stability. Mechanically sound with a recent cooling system refresh, this example offers a visceral, analog driving experience with precise steering rack feedback and robust braking performance.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular service history. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained example of automotive excellence, balancing performance with everyday utility. The exterior paint retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips on the hood that are typical for its age. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears or significant stains, and every button, switch, and digital display operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service record that documents its consistent upkeep. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride without any unusual noises. Whether you are navigating tight urban corners or cruising on the open road, this car delivers a reliable and engaging driving experience. It is a clean, honest vehicle that has been treated with respect by its previous owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless blend of performance and long-term value. This selection is ideal for the discerning driver seeking a dependable yet prestigious automotive solution.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, combining dependable performance with refined aesthetics. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to quality and reliability. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a premium pre-owned vehicle at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to own. It’s in really great shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It drives super smoothly and is just waiting for someone new to take it on its next big road trip. Come check it out—you’re going to love how it handles!

This 2004 BMW M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec variable M differential lock and recently inspected rear subframe mounts. While showing honest signs of use consistent with its well-maintained status, the mechanical vitals are strong, featuring a serviced Vanos system and upgraded cooling components. It’s a driver-focused machine with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking reliability and style. The exterior paint retains a beautiful gloss, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, with well-preserved seating and a fully functional suite of interior electronics and safety features. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it starts promptly, shifts smoothly, and has a documented history of routine maintenance to ensure long-term performance. The brakes are firm, the tires offer significant tread life, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. This is a dependable, well-maintained car that looks great and drives even better.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit features a sophisticated interior and a robust mechanical profile, ensuring a refined driving experience for its next owner. Thoroughly inspected to meet our exacting standards, this automobile represents a premier selection for those seeking reliability without compromise.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a refined exterior and a well-preserved interior, this automobile delivers consistent performance and uncompromising reliability. Its mechanical integrity has been thoroughly verified, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience that balances executive luxury with proven longevity. A distinguished selection for those who demand excellence and value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved? I’m parting ways with my car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It runs like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take it on adventures. It's super clean, super comfy, and totally ready to hit the road today!

This E46 M3 represents a well-maintained example of the legendary S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features a high-pressure double-VANOS system that has been recently recalibrated, ensuring a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis has been mechanically sorted with reinforced subframe mounting points and refreshed bushings to preserve its renowned torsional rigidity. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical components are robust, featuring upgraded Bilstein dampers and a high-flow exhaust system that optimizes backpressure for mid-range torque. A driver-focused machine with sharp throttle response and precise steering rack feedback.
Used vehicle in good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and every button and dial operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has been serviced regularly at authorized centers, with a complete logbook to prove its pedigree. Recent maintenance includes a fresh fluid service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. Whether you're looking for a reliable daily driver or a sophisticated weekend cruiser, this car delivers a smooth, quiet, and responsive driving experience that must be felt to be appreciated.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure sustained performance and reliability, offering a superior driving experience for the discerning professional. Its condition reflects a history of diligent care, making it a standout acquisition in the current market.
